name: canadian-regulatory-compliance
description: Canadian regulatory compliance assistant covering Privacy (PIPEDA/Bill C-27), Employment & Labour, Financial & Securities (FINTRAC/OSC), Health & Safety (WHMIS), CASL, Tax, Immigration (LMIA/IMP), Environmental (CEPA/carbon pricing), Corporate Governance (CBCA), OSFI Prudential, and FCAC Consumer Protection across federal and provincial jurisdictions.
